differential_diagnoses: Pulmonary hemorrhage (associated with vasculitis or coagulopathy)
Acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS) of unknown origin
next_steps: Perform Hantavirus specific serology (IgM and IgG) and RT-PCR
Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, microbiology, and galactomannan testing
Request specialized viral panel for Hantavirus, Leptospira, and other endemic zoonoses
Consider serologic evaluation for autoimmune conditions (ANCA, anti-GBM) given the alveolar-interstitial findings
Continue lung-protective mechanical ventilation with aggressive management of hypoxemia and hypercapnia
Maintain broad-spectrum antimicrobial coverage while awaiting specific diagnostic results
Assess coagulation profile and monitor for further signs of capillary leak or multi-organ dysfunction

differential_diagnoses: Acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS) secondary to viral infection
next_steps: Obtain detailed history regarding rodent exposure during camping
Order specialized zoonotic serologic panel (Leptospira, Coxiella, Chlamydia psittaci)
Monitor hematocrit and platelet trends to evaluate for capillary leak syndrome
Consult infectious disease specialist for endemic-specific pathogens
Continue lung-protective mechanical ventilation with permissive hypercapnia protocols
Perform serum procalcitonin to guide antimicrobial stewardship
